ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
department: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
implementing_agency: MeitY Startup Hub (MSH), Digital India Corporation
status_evidence: https://msh.meity.gov.in/schemes/samridh
target_beneficiaries: Eligible accelerators as direct scheme partners and selected product-based or IT-based startups as downstream beneficiaries.
startup_stage: Potential technology and software-product startups requiring acceleration from product or prototype development towards commercialization and growth.
application_url: NO_CURRENT_APPLICATION_ROUTE
eligibility: Direct scheme partners are existing or upcoming accelerators operating in India. The scheme document requires relevant incubation or accelerator experience, startup-support track record, suitable infrastructure, mentor and investor networks, and capability to run structured cohorts. Startups participate as downstream beneficiaries through accelerators selected under cohort-specific calls.
benefits: Selected startups may receive customized acceleration services, customer and investor connections, mentoring, legal and product support, market-access assistance and matching funding support under an approved SAMRIDH cohort.
application_process: MeitY Startup Hub or its implementing arrangement issues a cohort-specific Expression of Interest or call for accelerators. Eligible accelerators apply and undergo expert evaluation. Selected accelerators then operate cohorts and select eligible startups through their governed screening process. No currently open SAMRIDH application window has been verified.
